converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Sloan Program in Health Services Administration records
New York State College of Human Ecology. Sloan Program in Health Services Administration
New York State College of Human Ecology. Dept. of Policy Analysis and Management
New York State College of Human Ecology. Dept. of Human Service Studies
23-26-3273
5.4 cubic feet. 5.4 cubic feet.
1983-2012. Minutes, correspondence, photographs, and alumni directories. Includes minutes of meetings, correspondence, photographs, and alumni directories concerning the Sloan Program in Health Services Administration. Collection material in English 4748569
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
EAD encoding:
Martin Heggestad, July 2003
Date modified:
RMC Staff, July 2013; RMC Staff, December 2015
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
The Sloan Program was founded in 1955 as part of the Cornell Graduate School of Business and Public Administration. In 1984 it transfered to the Dept. of Human Service Studies, now called Policy Analysis and Management, in the New York State College of Human Ecology. In October of 1987 the faculty of the College of Human Ecology voted unanimously to make the Sloan Program a permanent part of the College.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes minutes of meetings, correspondence, photographs, and alumni directories concerning the Sloan Program in Health Services Administration.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Reports/Proposals/Reviews
Series II. Board Meetings/Class Material
Series III. Correspondence
Series IV. Programs and internships
Series V. Associations and Committees
Series VI. Grants
Series VII. Publications/Publicity
Series VIII. Scholarships and Awards
Series IX. Resumes and Class Lists
Series X. Resumes and Class Lists
Series XI. Conferences
Series XII. Photographs
Series XIII. Miscellaneous
General
Additional material and digital versions can be found online here: http://ecommons.cornell.edu/handle/1813/11741
Cite As:
Sloan Program in Health Services Administration records, #23-26-3273. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Photographs. Public health administration -- Handbooks, manuals, etc. Public health -- New York (State) -- Tompkins County. Cornell University. Graduate School of Business and Public Administration
